name: SVG Mask Effect
summary: A full-screen component with a mouse-following mask that reveals text when hovering with an expanding reveal area.
detailedDescription: SVG Mask Effect creates an interactive full-screen experience where a mask follows the mouse cursor, revealing content underneath as it moves. The component uses CSS mask-image with an SVG mask that repeats at a configurable size (default 40px). On hover, the mask size expands from a small initial size to a much larger reveal size (default 600px), creating a spotlight-like effect that shows more of the underlying content. The background color transitions between white and slate-900 on hover using Framer Motion's animate. Mouse position is tracked via event listeners and used to update the mask position in real-time with smooth transitions. The component displays two layers of content - children text that appears within the masked area with a semi-transparent overlay, and revealText that sits underneath fully visible. When hovering, the mask follows the cursor with a brief delay for smooth tracking. This creates an engaging discovery interaction where users explore content by moving their cursor across the screen, perfect for dramatic reveals, interactive storytelling, or attention-grabbing hero sections.
purpose: Create interactive reveal effects controlled by mouse movement
Enable exploratory content discovery through cursor interaction
Add dramatic visual interest to full-screen sections
behavior: Tracks mouse position and updates mask location in real-time
Expands mask size on hover enter, contracts on leave
Transitions background color between light and dark on hover
Uses CSS mask-image for content reveal effect
Applies smooth easing to mask position and size changes
Displays different content layers for masked and revealed states
visualCharacteristics: Text reveals progressively as mask moves
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
